hero.title: Hi, I'm Ekki
hero.subtitle: Senior Software Engineer (QA)
hero.description: I bridge the gap between Manual Testing and Automated Engineering. With 4+ years at Ninja Van, I build custom frameworks and internal tools that empower teams to ship faster, with confidence.

philosophy.title: Quality Engineering
philosophy.intro: Quality isn't just about finding bugs. It's about designing systems that prevent them.
philosophy.listIntro: My approach builds on three pillars:

list.auth: Tooling over Toil: Automating repetitive tasks to empower testers to focus on exploration and strategy.
list.code: Shift Left: Catching issues during development, not after deployment.
list.adaptability: Technical Agility: Seamlessly switching contexts - Java, Go, Python - to match the team's evolving stack and business needs.
list.reliability: Force Multiplier: Stepping up during critical shortages to solve complex automation problems and keep the pipeline moving.

philosophy.conclusion: Quality is an engineering discipline. I build the tools and frameworks that enforce reliability. Whether it's a Go backend or this React platform, I write code that solves real quality problems.

milestones.title: My Journey
milestones.subtitle: Key milestones from my engineering journey

items.title: TestingWithEkki
items.description: Started building this platform to share knowledge and bridge the gap between manual testing and engineering. A playground for modern web tech and high-quality automation patterns.

items.title: AI & Cost Efficiency
items.description: Built the company's first AI testing framework in a team of three for intent classification, automating 50%+ of Tier 1 support. Validated features for a major optimization initiative that improved operational efficiency and saved over $60,000 per month.

items.title: Senior Engineer & Mentor
items.description: Promoted to Senior QA. Identified internal team bottlenecks and engineered custom solutions: a Chrome extension for payload decoding and a config validation tool that boosted accuracy by 60%, preventing critical production failures.

items.title: Shift-Left Integration
items.description: Co-developed the company's first integration testing framework using Go, empowering the team to adopt shift-left testing and accelerate defect detection by 80%.

items.title: Framework Stability
items.description: Engineered a robust automation framework with <1% regression error rate. Enforced quality gates in CI/CD, eliminating recurring build failures.

items.title: Backend Intern
items.description: Joined Ninja Van as a Backend Engineer Intern. Built secure RESTful APIs and data cleanup services before transitioning to specialize in Quality Engineering.

expertise.title: Technical Expertise
expertise.subtitle: My toolkit for building stable, scalable systems

contact.title: Looking for a QA Engineer who understands the full stack?
